MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $530.00 FILED BY CHAN, CHRISTINE WAH AS TO DEFENDANT MY DAY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, CHRISTINE WAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MY DAY, INC. PLAINTIFF PAID DEPOSIT FOR SERVICES KNOWING OF POSTED NO REFUND POLICY THAT IS INDUSTRY STANDARD AS DEMONSTRATED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
